meta.design_philosophy: Refined, cohesive, airy. White cards on soft gray. 16px radius everywhere.

instructions_to_main_agent: STEP 1: Update '/app/frontend/src/theme/designSystem.ts' to match these new colors, typography, and shadows. Ensure keys remain compatible where possible but update values.
STEP 2: Deprecate or unify '/app/frontend/src/theme/index.ts' if it conflicts.
STEP 3: Refactor 'Home' screen (/app/frontend/app/(tabs)/home.tsx):
- Change background color to 'colors.background.default' (#F2F4F7).
- Update Matchday Card to use 'shadows.card_md' and 'radius.card' (16px).
- Add the dynamic info row below matchday title as requested (countdown or match count).
- Add subtle fade-in animation on load (Animated.timing).
- Update 'StatusBadge' component to use the new uniform badge styles.
STEP 4: Refactor 'Predictions' screen:
- Ensure locked state has reduced saturation (opacity 0.6).
- Make 1X2 buttons large, 16px radius, high contrast on selection.
STEP 5: Refactor 'Rankings' screen:
- Highlight top 3 with special background (gold/silver/bronze tint or just 'colors.status.locked.bg' for 1st).
STEP 6: Refactor 'Profile' screen:
- Make 'Admin Console' a clean, distinct button.
- Subtle logout button.
STEP 7: General Polish:
- Verify all touchables have 'activeOpacity' and maybe a 'scale' transform on press using Animated.
- Ensure no pure black (#000) text; use #111827.
- Ensure padding is consistent (multiples of 4, prefer 16/24).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Component Reuse: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Export Conventions: Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...), Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Toasts: Use 'sonner' for toasts if available, or build a custom Toast component in React Native (do not use web libraries).
